description_long: This is a dark wooden cabinet with a rectangular shape and a classic, slightly ornate design. The front features two paneled doors with decorative carvings and brass hinges, as well as two round metal handles for opening. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving it a rich, natural appearance, and the finish is smooth with a subtle sheen. The sides and back are plain, with the same dark wood texture, and the top is flat, suitable for placing objects. The cabinet appears sturdy and well-constructed, likely intended for indoor or sheltered outdoor use in urban environments such as entryways, garages, or porches. There are no visible glass panels or open shelving, and the interior is not visible from any angle.
description: A dark wooden cabinet with two paneled doors, brass hardware, and a smooth, flat top. The design is classic and sturdy, with visible wood grain and subtle decorative details.
description_view_0: Front view showing two paneled doors with decorative carvings, brass hinges, and round metal handles.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a plain, flat wooden surface with visible wood grain and no additional features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a solid, unadorned wooden back panel with a consistent dark finish.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, identical to the other side, with a plain wooden surface and visible grain.
